title: Webinar - How to increase your monday.com ROI

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to announce the next series of our most popular webinar is ON!

Wednesday, 7th June @ 12 pm AEST

The last webinar had over 100 participants! In June, we will focus on how you can get the most from your current monday setup with LIVE ROI calculations, some of the overlooked or undiscovered possibilities, AND what exciting features you (may) never heard of or forgotten about! All from our field experience with our clients.

Registration: How to increase your ROI with monday.com

Your team at Kick <3 (kickconsutling.com.au)
